scripts.prepare:
node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const f=require('fs');f.writeFileSync('src/version.ts','// Auto-generated — DO NOT EDIT
export const CLI_VERSION = "'+p.version+'"
');const s=f.readFileSync('gangtise-openapi/SKILL.md','utf8');f.writeFileSync('gangtise-openapi/SKILL.md',s.replace(/^(version:\s*\?"?)[^\"'
]+/m,'$1'+p.version))" && npm run build
